Test fixture for file_scanner tests.

Expected structure:

root/
  test_name_1.txt                    100 bytes
  sub_directory_1/
    test_name_2.txt                  100 bytes
    test_name_3.txt                  200 bytes
  sub_directory_2/
    sub_directory_3/
      test_name_4.txt                200 bytes

Expected total root size: 600 bytes.
